userFeedback.summary: The previous global DOM side-effect rule was rejected as project-local over-optimization and not a reusable Harness improvement.

instructionCorrection.summary: Removed the project-local DOM rule and replaced it with the reusable criterion that Harness feedback must generalize to Agent-process failures.

targetedTestFix.summary: Pinned the weather forecast card test clock before its fixed 2026-06-13 match time so it does not fail after that date passes.

guardVerify.summary: Harness validation, design guard, diff guard, lint, typecheck, full Vitest suite, SQL contract check, and evidence guard passed after removing the overfit rule.

issuesObserved: The previous automation incorrectly promoted a project-local implementation concern into reusable Harness guidance.
missedEvidence: No browser runtime evidence is required for this documentation-only sync.
harnessImprovementProposal: Before updating AGENT.md or Harness docs, require the proposed feedback to generalize beyond the latest feature implementation.
retrospective.reason: This correction addresses the reusable failure in the automation process, not the tactics feature implementation detail.
